generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance CartStepperMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Trinamic TMC4671-Eval motor controller for the cart stepper motor, interfacing with Arduino for position control and power management"
]

instance HoistStepperMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Trinamic TMC4671-Eval motor controller for the hoist stepper motor, interfacing with Arduino for position control and swing compensation"
]

instance CraneElectromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnetic actuator at the hoist end for container pickup/drop operations, controlled via Arduino with current regulation"
]

instance ArduinoController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino-based system coordinating all sensors (encoders, anemometer, swing angle) and actuators (motors, electromagnet) with MQTT communication"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-resolution encoder measuring the swinging motion of the hoist cable to enable real-time trajectory correction"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance AnemometerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Wind speed sensor providing real-time environmental data for trajectory optimization and fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Absolute position encoder for the cart stepper motor tracking horizontal movement with sub-millimeter precision"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Absolute position encoder for the hoist stepper motor tracking vertical movement and cable length"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistPositionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Data Transmitted (Physical-to-Virtual)
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AnemometerSensor
]

instance CartPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartPositionEncoder
]

instance HoistPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistPositionEncoder
]

instance CraneStateEventsTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoController
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical model of the crane's kinematics including swing dynamics, used for trajectory planning and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CraneSimulationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorEnabler
]

instance CraneSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Digital replica of the crane and controllers implementing physics-based simulation for control strategy testing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CraneSimulationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
]

instance CraneHistoricalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series database storing operational data including trajectories, sensor readings, and event logs for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateEventsTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionDataAggregated
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataAnalysisEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance TrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time and historical trajectory data including planned and actual paths with timestamp metadata"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionDataAggregated
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorEnabler
]

instance PositionDataAggregated : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated position data combining cart and hoist encoder readings with swing compensation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance CADModel3D : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD representation of the gantry crane in Fusion360 used for visualization and physical modeling validation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance CraneSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based simulation environment executing the CraneSimulationModel for control strategy testing"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneSimulationService
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module (gantrylib) implementing optimal trajectory generation using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance ValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based validation framework comparing simulated vs actual trajectories for fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryValidationService
]

instance DataAnalysisEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB query engine and Python analytics pipeline for historical data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard with Python backend for real-time monitoring and visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneDashboardService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker facilitating real-time communication between physical sensors and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIngestionService
]

instance DockerContainerizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containers orchestrating all Python services with isolated environments"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneSimulationService
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryValidationService
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneDashboardService
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIngestionService
]

// C6: Services
instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal crane trajectories using kinematic models while accounting for swing dynamics and wind conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryExecutionAction
]

instance CraneSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes physics-based simulation of crane behavior for control strategy validation and testing"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultsInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlStrategyValidationAction
]

instance TrajectoryValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously compares simulated and actual trajectories to detect anomalies or faults in real-time"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryCorrectionAction
]

instance CraneDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring dashboard showing crane states, trajectories, and operational alerts"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalMonitoringInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides AlertNotificationAction
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analyzes historical data to predict potential failures in motors or other components"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceRecommendationInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides PreventiveAction
]

instance DataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Receives real-time sensor data via MQTT and processes it for storage and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataQualityInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified optimal crane trajectories that minimize residual swinging and operational time"
]

instance SimulationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results from simulated crane behavior tests showing control strategy effectiveness"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected deviations from expected trajectories indicating potential faults or operational issues"
]

instance OperationalMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of crane states including positions, velocities, and environmental conditions"
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted maintenance needs based on historical wear patterns and operational data"
]

instance DataQualityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of data quality and completeness from physical sensors"
]

instance TrajectoryExecutionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Execution of generated trajectories by the physical crane system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TrajectoryCorrectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time correction of crane trajectories based on validation results"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlStrategyValidationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Validation of new control strategies through simulation before physical implementation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AlertNotificationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Notification of operators via dashboard alerts for critical conditions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PreventiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Scheduled maintenance actions based on predictive maintenance insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C1: Environment
instance CraneSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment containing the lab-scale gantry crane system and associated hardware components"
    base:contains CraneHardwareComponent
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Virtual environment hosting all digital twin components including models, services, and data storage"
    base:contains CraneSimulationComponent
    base:contains DataStorageComponent
    base:contains ServiceContainerComponent
]

// C5: Components
instance CraneHardwareComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical gantry crane system including motors, sensors, electromagnet, and Arduino controller"
    base:isContainedIn CraneSystemEnvironment
]

instance CraneSimulationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital simulation environment implementing the crane's physics and control systems"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
    base:contains CraneKinematicModel
    base:contains CraneSimulationModel
]

instance DataStorageComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database storing historical operational data and time-series metrics"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
    base:contains CraneHistoricalData
]

instance ServiceContainerComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Docker containerized environment hosting all digital twin services"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
    base:contains CraneSimulationEnabler
    base:contains TrajectoryGeneratorEnabler
    base:contains ValidationEnabler
    base:contains DataAnalysisEnabler
    base:contains VisualizationEnabler
    base:contains MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital twin influences the physical system through:
  - **Trajectory Generation Service**: Generates optimal movement trajectories for the crane (e.g., minimizing residual swinging motion) and sends control commands to the crane via the **Control Application**.
  - **Simulation Service**: Simulates crane behavior and controller performance, which can be used to refine control strategies or predict outcomes before physical execution.
  - **Continuous Validation Service**: Compares simulated trajectories with actual measurements and alerts operators if deviations exceed acceptable thresholds (e.g., via the dashboard)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation consists of:
  - **Physical System**: Crane hardware, Arduino, and controllers.
  - **Digital Twin Components**:
    - **Database** (TimescaleDB) for storing data.
    - **Dashboard** (Grafana) for visualization.
    - **Trajectory Generator Service** (kinematic model-based).
    - **Simulation Service** (digital replica of the crane).
    - **Continuous Validation Service** (compares simulated vs. actual trajectories).
    - **MQTT Broker** (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication.
  - **Orchestration**: Python module (`gantrylib`) integrates all services and interfaces with the physical system via Docker containers (for database, dashboard, broker)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin covers the **as-operated** phase of the crane's lifecycle, focusing on real-time monitoring, control, and validation during operation. It does not explicitly model the 'as-designed' or 'as-manufactured' phases, though CAD models and kinematic simulations are used for planning and validation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Continuous Validation**: Compares simulated trajectories with actual measurements using distance metrics and thresholds.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Simulation confidence bounds (upper/lower bounds) are derived for trajectory predictions.
  - **Verification**: Testing of digital twin services (e.g., trajectory generation, fault detection) against physical crane data.
  - **Validation**: Use of existing model validation techniques (e.g., [4], [5]) to ensure accuracy of kinematic and simulation models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical and digital twin uses:
  - **Network Protocol**: MQTT (Eclipse Mosquitto broker) for real-time data exchange between services and the physical system.
  - **Data Flow**: Sensor data (Arduino) → MQTT → Digital Twin Services → Control Commands → Physical Crane.
  - **Synchronization**: High-frequency data streams (e.g., motor positions) for real-time control and validation."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is hosted and deployed on:
  - **Physical Crane**: Runs on a personal computer with all software (Python, Docker containers) installed locally.
  - **Docker Containers**: Containerized components (database, dashboard, MQTT broker) managed via `docker-compose`.
  - **Cloud/Remote**: Not explicitly used; the setup is designed for local deployment on a single machine for simplicity."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Limited horizontal integration is mentioned, but the exemplar primarily focuses on the crane and its digital twin. Extensions for teaching include:
  - Integration with a **harbor system** (e.g., container identification, ship buoyancy models) for broader logistics use cases.
  - **Capella models** for system engineering education (e.g., modeling the harbor and ship digital twins)."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is not explicitly addressed in the document. The exemplar is published under an **MIT license**, suggesting open access to the code and data. Privacy considerations are not detailed, but the use of open-source tools (e.g., TimescaleDB, Grafana) implies standard data handling practices."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The exemplar does not adhere to specific digital twin standards but uses:
  - **Open-Source Technologies**: TimescaleDB, Grafana, Eclipse Mosquitto, Docker.
  - **Ad-Hoc Approach**: No dedicated digital twin framework (e.g., Eclipse Ditto, BaSyx) is used, though these could be integrated in future work.
  - **Modeling Standards**: CAD models (Fusion360), Arcadia/Capella for system engineering (used in teaching)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
  - **Localized Deployment**: All components run on a personal computer, reducing exposure to cyber threats.
  - **Continuous Validation**: Real-time monitoring mitigates operational risks (e.g., crane malfunctions) by alerting operators to deviations.
  - **No Remote Operation**: The system is designed for lab-scale use with human oversight; remote execution of unsafe operations is not supported.
  - **Lack of Formal Safety Standards**: No mention of ISO 13849, functional safety, or cybersecurity protocols (e.g., TLS, authentication). Safety relies on manual operator intervention via the Human Machine Interface."
]
